title: January 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 20''' is the 20th day of the year. 345 days (346 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Apple Brook]] is born.
*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Tom Baker]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Dave Fennoy]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[R. A. Salvatore]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Gerry Alanguilan]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Gary Barlow]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 46|''Star Wars'' (1977) 46]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – [[Dark Times 15|''Dark Times'' 15]] published.
*2010 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 49|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 49]] published.
*[[2011]] – [http://www.starwars.com/vault/books/darkhorse_jan19/index.html ''Star Wars Galaxy Comic'' issue 4] published.
*[[2012]] – "[[Deception]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Insider 155|''Star Wars Insider'' 155]] published.
*[[2016]] – "[[A Princess on Lothal]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 14|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 14]] published in Germany.
*[[2019]] – "[[Dangerous Business]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 7|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 7]] published.
<noinclude>
